item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
which one of yall came up with the half-baked siivagunner ripoff

if i hadn't been planning on upvoting already i'd have upvoted at that line. gold!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
damn AWCY just let them gamers do their thing

I like this article. It focuses on the relationship between AWCY and GAW, and I'd be lying if I said I didn't want to see more of this.

p.s. "you'll never see it coming" i see what you did there

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Please Read the Special Dad Channel Descriptions.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I saw this in the drafts…but it wasn't in your sandbox…

Really glad i came looking for it since you had already finished it! It's a little long, but I like it, the ending is the best part, and it gets my +1

EDIT: Oh, and I wanted to point out that at this moment, you have 35 upvotes with 0 downvotes. You are batting 1.000 buddy!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Sincerest apologies for not taking your initial advice of changing the premise of the anomaly entirely.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Very happy to see this pan out.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This honestly is so much fun to read. It gets my seal of Definitely Happened In The Gaw Canon I Write In, which I just don't hand out super often.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I enjoy this because it ties into my headcanon about AWCY? becoming noticeably past its' past, as a movement. Like, despite how throughly Jude burned his bridges with them, here we have them ineffectually trying to tempt him back, because they're apparently that desperate for people who are actually talented.

I also enjoy this because it's the first time I've seen AWCY?'s involvement used as a twist ending and felt that the twist improved the article.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: The supplemental material really made this for me, great stuff. As I've said before, I'm a sucker for AWCY? and to see them infiltrate more groups than the Foundation is real nice.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Very well done. I had been tossing around the idea of making an anomalous SiivaGunner expy as an SCP, but never came up with a good angle to make it interesting. You definitely have. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I was almost certainly that "someone." In any case, thank you for the kind words and I'm glad it still worked!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I remember someone talking about "AWCY? putting GAW's name on something to try to nudge them in the right direction" in the IRC one time and this still managed to catch me off guard. Nice work. And "heyjude.zip" is hilarious now that I understand why it's called that.

For a little bit I thought "they just made siivagunner anomalous :/" but namedropping the actual siivagunner made me feel better about that. In-universe it's a ripoff, so I can accept that.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I was partly afraid, honestly, that the combined burnout on GAW and AWCY? would elicit a collective groan from the community at best.

Your response made my day. Thank you.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
If you'd told me just an hour ago that I would be upvoting a Mister Against Weed combined with an Are We Cool Yet?, I would have called you crazy and a fool.

Looks like I'm the crazy fool.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Freakin' artists. Just let them Gamers do what they want.

item.title: High Quality Ripoff
item.content:encoded:
Special thanks to: Bec, Eli, Nia, Teo, AshGray, kinchtheknifeblade, modern_erasmus, and Jazstar.

I realize the folly of making such a niche thing for my first skip, but it's an idea I've been sitting on for the longest time and I just really wanted to get it off my chest.

If anything ends up being too on-the-nose, let me know.
